# PILOT_REPORT_TEMPLATE

> Used after running the Stage 0-4 vertical slice pilot (per Blueprint §5-§12 and the
> Playbook's Pilot Workflow).

## Input Case

- Description of the real, naturally incomplete case used

## Hypotheses Recorded Before the Run

- E1 — Classification gate reduces uncertainty: <result>
- E2 — Confidence is useful and honest: <result>
- E3 — Ask-not-infer produces the right questions: <result>
- E4 — Single workflow holds depth across entry points: <result>
- E5 — Metadata-based candidate selection is meaningful: <result>

## Success Criteria Recorded Before the Run

- <list, copied verbatim from what was written down beforehand>

## Observed Outcome

- What the system actually did, stage by stage

## Evaluation

- Did the system ask the right questions at the right time?
- Did it avoid guessing when evidence was insufficient?
- Did confidence remain grounded in evidence?
- Was the output useful to a human reviewer?
- Did the implementation remain within the frozen architecture?

## Go/No-Go

- Content gaps found (continue) vs. structural gaps found (STOP, escalate to
  `@architecture-guardian` and the human)

## Decision

- Continue to next stage / Stop and escalate
